block.header: nipimurwo no kabekusa kari ni imasitamapane kusa no goto yoriapu wotomye pa kimi ga manima ni
nipimurwo wo pumisidumu kwo ga tadama si naru mo tama no goto teraseru kimi wo uti ni to mawose
patuse no yutukwi ga sita ni wa ga kakuseru tuma akanesasi tereru tukuywo ni pito mitemu kamo
patuse no yutukwi ga sita ni wa ga kakuseru tuma akanesasi tereru tukuywo ni pito mitu ramu ka
masurawo no omopimidarete kakuseru so no tuma ametuti ni toporiteru tomo arapareme ya mo
masurawo no omopitakyebwite kakuseru so no tuma ametuti ni toporiteru tomo arapareme ya mo
utukusi to wa ga omopu imo pa paya mo sinanu ka ikyeri tomo ware ni yoru besi to pito no ipanaku ni
komanisiki pimo no katapye zo toko ni otinikyeru asu no ywo si komu to si ipaba torioki matamu
asatwode no kimi ga ayupi wo nurasu tuyupara tutwoni okwi idetutu ware mo mosuswo nurasana
nani semu ni inoti wo motona nagaku pori semu ikyeri tomo wa ga omopu imo ni yasuku apanaku ni
iki no wo ni ware pa omopedo pitome opomi koso puku kaze ni araba sibasiba apu beki monowo
pito no oya no wotomyekwo suwete moru yamapye kara asanasana kaywopisi kimi ga koneba kanasi mo
amenaru pitotu tanapasi ikani ka yukamu wakakusano tumagari to ipaba asi yosopi semu
yamasiro no kuse no wakugwo ga posi to ipu ware apusawani ware wo posi to ipu yamasiro no kuse
woka no saki tamwitaru miti wo pito na kaywopi so aritutu mo kimi ga kimasamu yokwimiti ni semu
tamadareno wosu no sukyeki ni iri kaywopikone taratineno papa ga twopasaba kaze to mawosamu
utipisasu miyadi ni apisi pitoduma yuweni tamanowono omopimidarete nuru ywo si zo opoki
maswokagami misi ka to omopu imo mo apanu kamo tamanowono tayetaru kwopwi no sigeki ko no koro
unapara no miti ni norite ya wa ga kwopwi woramu opobune no yutani aru ramu pito no kwo yuweni
taratineno papa ga te panare kaku bakari subye naki koto pa imada senaku ni
pito no nuru umai pa nezute pasikiyasi kimi ga me sura wo porite nagekamu
pito no nuru umai pa nezute pasikiyasi kimi wo omopu ni akenikyeru kamo
kwopwisinaba kwopwi mo sine to ya tamapokono miti yuku pito no koto mo tugenaku
kokoro ni pa tipye ni omopedo pito ni ipanu wa ga kwopwiduma wo mimu yosi moga mo
kaku bakari kwopwimu mono zo to siramaseba topoku mo mi beku aramasi monowo
itu pa si mo kwopwinu toki to pa aranedomo yupu katamakete kwopwi pa subye nasi
kaku nomwi si kwopwi ya wataramu tamakiparu inoti mo sirazu tosi pa penitutu
wa ga noti ni umaremu pito pa wa ga gotoku kwopwi suru miti ni apikosu na yume
masurawo no utusigokoro mo ware pa nasi yworu piru to ipazu kwopwi si watareba
nani semu ni inoti tugikyemu wagimokwo ni kwopwizaru saki ni sinamasi monowo
yosiweyasi kimasanu kimi wo nani semu ni itopazu ware pa kwopwitutu woramu
miwataseba tikaki watari wo tamotopori ima ka kimasu to kwopwitutu zo woru
pasikiyasi ta ga sapure kamo tamapokono miti miwasurete kimi ga kimasanu
kimi ga me wo mimaku pori site ko no putaywo titose no goto mo wa pa kwopuru kamo
utipisasu miyadi wo pito pa mitiyukedo wa ga omopu kimi pa tada pitori nomwi
yo no naka no tune kaku nomwi to omopedomo katate wasurezu napo kwopwinikyeri
wa ga sekwo pa sakiku imasu to kapyeriku to ware ni tugekomu pito mo konu kamo
aratamano itutose puredo wa ga kwopwi no atwo naki kwopwi no yamanaku ayasi
ipapo sura yukitoporu beki masurawo mo kwopwi to ipu koto pa noti kui ni ari
kenarabeba pito sirinu besi kyepu no pi pa titose no goto mo arikosenu kamo
tatite wite tadwoki mo sirazu omopedomo imo ni tugeneba matukapi mo kozu
nubatamano ko no ywo na ake so akarapiku asa yuku kimi wo mataba kurusi mo
kwopwi suru ni sini suru mono ni aramaseba wa ga mwi pa titabi sinikapyeramasi
tamayurani kinopu no yupupye misi monowo kyepu no asita ni kwopu beki mono ka
nakanakani mizarisi ywori pa apimite pa kwoposiki kokoro masite omopoyu
tamapokono miti yukazu araba nemokorono kakaru kwopwi ni pa apazaramasi wo
asakage ni wa ga mwi pa narinu tamakagiru ponokani miyete inisi kwo yuweni
yukiyukite apanu imo yuwe pisakatano amatuyusimo ni nurenikyeru kamo
tamasakani wa ga misi pito wo ikanaramu yosi wo motite ka mata pitome mimu
simasiku mo mineba kwoposiki wagimokwo wo pi ni pi ni kureba koto no sigekyeku
tosikiparu yo made to sadame tanomitaru kimi ni yorite si koto no sigekyeku
akarapiku pada mo purezute netaredomo kokoro wo kyesiku wa ga omopanaku ni
ide ikani kokoda panapada twogokoro no usuru made omopu kwopuraku no yuwe
kwopwisinaba kwopwi mo sine to ka wagimokwo ga wagipye no kadwo wo sugwite yuku ramu
imo ga atari topoku mo mireba ayasiku mo ware pa kwopuru ka apu yosi nasi ni
tamakuse no kiywoki kapara ni misogi site ipapu inoti pa imo ga tame koso
omopiyori mite pa yorinisi mono ni areba pitopi no apida mo wasurete omope ya
kakipo nasu pito pa ipedomo komanisiki pimo tokiakesi kimi naranaku ni
komanisiki pimo tokiakete yupupye dani sirazu aru inoti kwopwitutu ka aramu
momosaka no pune kogu ura no yaura sasi papa pa twopu tomo so no na pa norazi
maywone kaki panapwi pimo toke matu ramu ka itu ka mo mimu to omopyeru ware wo
kimi ni kwopwi urabure woreba kuyasiku mo wa ga sitabimo wo yupu te itadurani
aratamano tosi pa kiparedo sikitapeno swode kapesi kwo wo wasurete omope ya
sirwotapeno swode wo patupatu misi karani kakaru kwopwi wo mo ware pa suru kamo
wagimokwo ni kwopwite subye nami ime mimu to ware pa omopedo inerayenaku ni
yuwe mo naku wa ga sitabimo no ima tokuru pito ni na sirase tadani apu madeni
kwopuru koto nagusamekanete idete yukeba yama mo kapa wo mo sirazu kinikyeri
wotomyera wo swode puru yama no midukaki no pisasiki toki yu omopikyeri ware pa
tipayaburu kamwi no motaseru inoti woba ta ga tameni ka mo nagaku pori semu
iswonokami puru no kamusugwi kamusabwisi kwopwi wo mo ware pa sarani suru kamo
ikanaramu na opu kamwi ni tamuke seba wa ga omopu imo wo ime ni dani mimu
ametuti to ipu na no tayete araba koso imasi to ware to apu koto yamame
tukwi mireba kuni pa oyazi so yama pyenari utukusi imo pa pyedatitaru kamo
kuru miti pa ipa pumu yama pa naku moga mo wa ga matu kimi ga uma tumaduku ni
ipane pumi pyenareru yama pa aranedomo apanu pi manemi kwopwiwataru kamo
miti no siri pukatusimayama simasiku mo kimi ga me mineba kurusikarikyeri
pimokagami notokanoyama mo ta ga yuwe ka kimi kimaseru ni pimo tokazu nemu
yamasina no kopata no yama wo uma pa aredo kati yu wa ga kosi na wo omopikane
topoyama ni kasumi tanabiki iya toponi imo ga me mineba ware kwopwinikyeri
udikapa no seze no sikinami sikusikuni imo pa kokoro ni norinikyeru kamo
tipayapito udi no watari no se wo payami apazu koso are noti mo wa ga tuma
pasikiyasi apanu kwo yuweni itadurani udikapa no se ni mosuswo nurasitu
udikapa no minawa sakamaki yuku midu no koto kapyerazu so omopisometesi
kamogapa no notise sidukeku noti mo apamu imo ni pa ware pa ima narazu tomo
koto ni idete ipaba yuyusimi yamagapa no tagitu kokoro wo sekiapete ari
midu no upe ni kazu kaku gotoki wa ga inoti imo ni apamu to ukepituru kamo
ariswokwosi poka yuku nami no pokagokoro ware pa omopazi kwopwite sinu tomo
apuminoumi oki tu siranami siranedomo imogari to ipaba nanuka kwoyekomu
opobuneno katori no umi ni ikari orosi ikanaru pito ka monoomopazaramu
okitumo wo kakusapu nami no ipopyenami tipye sikusikuni kwopwiwataru kamo
pitogoto pa simasi so wagimo tunate piku umi yu masarite pukaku si so omopu
apuminoumi oki tu simayama okumakete wa ga omopu imo ga koto no sigekyeku
apuminoumi oki kogu pune no ikari orosi kakurete kimi ga koto matu ware zo
komorinu no sita yu kwopureba sube wo nami imo ga na noritu imu beki monowo
opotuti mo toritukusamedo yo no naka no tukusienu mono pa kwopwi ni si arikyeri
komoridwo no sapaidumi n aru ipa ga ne mo toposite omopu wa ga kwopuraku pa
siramayumi iswopye no yama no tokipa naru inoti nare ya mo kwopwitutu woramu
apuminoumi siduku siratama sirazusite kwopwi sesi ywori pa ima koso masare
siratama wo makite motitari ima ywori pa wa ga tama ni semu sireru toki dani
siratama wo te ni makisi ywori wasurezi to omopisi koto pa nani ka woparamu
siratama no apida aketutu nukyeru wo mo kukuriyosureba mata apu monowo
kaguyama ni kumowi tanabiki opoposiku apimisi kwora wo noti kwopwimu kamo
kumoma ywori sawataru tukwi no opoposiku apimisi kwora wo mimu yosi moga mo
amakumo no yoriapi topomi apazu tomo kototamakura wo ware makame ya mo
kumo dani mo siruku si tataba kokoro yari mitutu mo aramu tadani apu madeni
paruyanagwi kadurakwiyama ni tatu kumo no tatite mo wite mo imo wo si so omopu
kasugayama kumowikakurite topokyedomo ipye pa omopazu kimi wo si so omopu
wa ga yuwe ni iparesi imo pa takayama no mine no asagwiri sugwinikyemu kamo
nubatamano kurwokamiyama no yamasuge ni kwosame purisiki sikusiku omopoyu
oponwora ni kwosame purisiku ko no moto ni toki to yorikone wa ga omopu pito
asasimo no kenaba kenu beku omopitutu ikani ko no ywo wo akasitemu kamo
wa ga sekwo ga pama yuku kaze no iya payani paya kotonasaba iya apazaramu
topoki imo ga purisakemitutu sinwopu ramu ko no tukwi no omo ni kumo na tanabiki
yama no pa wo sasiiduru tukwi no patupatuni imo wo so mituru kwoposiki madeni
wagimokwo ya ware wo omopaba maswokagami teriiduru tukwi no kage ni miyekone
pisakatano amateru tukwi no kakurenaba nani ni naswopete imo wo sinwopamu
mikadukwi no sayani mo miyezu kumogakure mimaku so posiki utate ko no koro
wa ga sekwo ni wa ga kwopwi woreba wa ga yadwo no kusa sape omopi uraburenikyeri
asadipara wonwo ni sime yupu munakoto mo ikanari to ipite kimi wo si matamu
miti no pye no kusapukayuri no yuri ni to pu imo ga inoti wo ware sirame ya mo
minatwoasi ni mazireru kusa no sirikusa no pito mwina sirinu wa ga sitamopi pa
yamadisa no siratuyu sigemi urabururu kokoro mo pukaku wa ga kwopwiyamazu
minatwo ni sanebapu kwosuge sinobizute kimi ni kwopwitutu arikatenu kamo
yamasiro no idumi no kwosuge naminami ni imo ga kokoro wo wa ga omopanaku ni
miwatasi no mimurwo no yama no ipaposuge nemokoro ware pa katamopi so suru
miwatasi no mimoro no yama no ipakwosuge nemokoro ware pa katamopi so suru
suganoneno nemokoro kimi ga musubitesi wa ga pimo no wo wo toku pito mo nasi
yamasugeno midarekwopwi nomwi sesimetutu apanu imo kamo tosi pa penitutu
wa ga yadwo no noki ni sidakusa opwitaredo kwopwiwasurekusa miredo opwinaku
utu ta ni pa piye pa si amata ari to ipedo erayesi ware so ywo wo pitori nuru
asipikino na ni opu yamasuge osipusete kimi si musubaba apazu arame ya mo
akikasipa uruwakapapye no sinwonome no pito ni pa apane kimi ni apenaku
sanekadura noti mo apamu to ime nomwi ni ukepiwatarite tosi pa penitutu
miti no bye no itisi no pana no itisirwoku pito mwina sirinu wa ga kwopwiduma wo
miti no bye no itisi no pana no itisirwoku pito sirinikyeri tugite si omopeba
oponwora ni tadwoki mo sirazu sime yupite ari so kaneturu wa ga kwopuraku pa
minasoko ni opuru tamamo no utinabiki kokoro pa yorite kwopuru ko no koro
sikitapeno koromode karete tamamo nasu nabiki ka nu ramu wa wo matigateni
kimi kozupa katami ni semu to wa ga putari uwesi matu no kwi kimi wo matiidemu
swode puraba miyu beki kagiri ware pa aredo so no matu ga ye ni kakuretarikyeri
tinunoumi no pamapye no kwomatu ne pukamete ware kwopwiwataru pito no kwo yuwe
tinunoumi no sipopwi no kwomatu nemokoroni kwopwi ya wataramu pito no kwo yuweni
narayama no kwomatu ga ure no uremu zo pa wa ga omopu imo ni apazu yaminamu
iswo no upe ni tateru murwonokwi nemokoroni nani ka pukamete omopisomekyemu
tatibana no moto ni wa wo tate siduye tori naramu ya kimi to twopisi kwora pa mo
amakumo ni pane utitukete tobu tadu no tadutadusi kamo kimi imasaneba
imo ni kwopwi inenu asake ni wosidori no koko yu wataru pa imo ga tukapi ka
omopi ni si amarinisikaba nipodorino nadusapikosi wo pito mikyemu kamo
takayama no mine yuku sisi no tomo wo opomi swode purazu kinu wasuru to omopu na
opobune ni makadi sizinuki kogu potwo mo kokodaku kwopwisi tosi ni araba ikani
taratineno papa ga kapu kwo no maywo komori kakureru imo wo mimu yosi moga mo
komapito no nukagami yupyeru simeyupu no siminisi kokoro ware wasureme ya
komapito no nukagami yupyeru simeyupu no siminisi kokoro wasurayeme ya mo
payapito no na ni opu ywogowe itisirwoku wa ga na pa noritu tuma to tanomase
turugitati moropa no twoki ni asi pumite sinaba sinu to mo kimi ni yorinamu
wagimokwo ni kwopwi si watareba turugitati na no wosikyeku mo omopikanetu mo
asadukupi mukapu tugekusi purinuredo nani si ka kimi ga miredo akazaramu
satwo topomi kwopwiuraburenu maswokagami toko no pye sarazu ime ni miyekoso
maswokagami te ni torimotite asanaasana miredomo kimi pa aku koto mo nasi
yupu sareba toko no pye saranu tugemakura nani si ka nare ga nusi matikataki
tokikinuno kwopwimidaretutu ukimanagwo ikite mo ware pa ariwataru kamo
adusayumi pikite yurusazu aramaseba kakaru kwopwi ni pa apazaramasi wo
kotodama no ya swo no timata ni yupuke twopu ura masani noru imo pa apiyoramu
tamapokono miti yuki ura ni uranapeba imo pa apamu to ware ni norituru
sumyeroki no kamwi no mikadwo wo kasikwomito samorapu toki ni apyeru kimi kamo
maswokagami mi tomo ipame ya tamakagiru ipakakiputi no komoritaru tuma
akagwoma no agaki payakyeba kumowi ni mo kakuriyukamu zo swode makye wagimo
komorikuno toyopatusedi pa tokonamye no kasikwoki miti so kwopuraku pa yume
umasakeno mimoro no yama ni tatu tukwi no migaposi kimi ga uma no oto so suru
naru kamwi no sukwosi toyomite sasikumori ame mo puranu ka kimi wo todomemu
naru kamwi no sukwosi toyomite purazu tomo ware pa todomaramu imo si todomeba
sikitapeno makura ugwokite yworu mo nezu omopu pito ni pa noti mo apamu kamo
sikitapeno makura ni pito pa kototopu ya so no makura ni pa koke musinitari
taratineno papa ni saparaba itadurani imasi mo ware mo kotonaru besi ya
wagimokwo ga ware wo okuru to sirwotapeno swode pitu madeni nakisi omopoyu
okuyamano makwi no itatwo wo osipiraki siweya idekone noti pa nani semu
karikomo no pitopye wo sikite sanuredomo kimi to si nureba samukyeku mo nasi
kakitupata niturapu kimi wo yukurinaku omopiidetutu nagekituru kamo
uramyesi to omopite sena pa arisikaba yoso nomwi so misi kokoro pa omopedo
saniturapu iro ni pa idene sukunaku mo kokoro no uti ni wa ga omopanaku ni
wa ga sekwo ni tadani apaba koso na pa tatame koto no kaywopi ni nani so soko yuwe
nemokoroni katamopi sure ka ko no koro no wa ga kokorodwo no ikyeru to mo naki
matu ramu ni itaraba imo ga uresimito wemamu sugata wo yukite paya mimu
tare so ko no wa ga yadwo kiywobu taratineno papa ni koropaye monoomopu ware wo
sanenu ywo pa tiywo mo ari tomo wa ga sekwo ga omopikuyu beki kokoro pa motazi
ipyebito pa miti mo simimini kaywopedomo wa ga matu imo ga tukapi konu kamo
aratama no kipe ga takagaki amime yu mo imo si miyenaba ware kwopwime ya mo
wa ga sekwo ga so no na norazi to tamakiparu inoti pa sutetu wasuretamapu na
obonaraba ta ga mimu to ka mo nubatamano wa ga kurwokami wo nabikete woramu
omowasure ikanaru pito no suru mono so ware pa sikanetu tugite si omopeba
apiomopanu pito no yuweni ka aratamano tosinowo nagaku wa ga kwopwi woramu
oborokano kokoro pa omopazi wa ga yuwe ni pito ni kotitaku ipayesi monowo
iki no wo ni imo wo si omopeba tositukwi no yuku ramu waki mo omopoyenu kamo
taratineno papa ni sirayezu wa ga moteru kokoro pa yosiwe kimi ga manima ni
pitori nu to komo kutime ya mo ayamusiro wo ni naru madeni kimi wo si matamu
apimite pa titose ya inuru inawokamo ware ya sika omopu kimi matigateni
puriwake no kami wo mizikami awokusa wo kami ni taku ramu imo wo si so omopu
tamotopori yukimwi no satwo ni imo wo okite kokoro swora nari tuti pa pumedomo
wakakusano nipitamakura wo makisomete ywo wo ya pyedatemu nikuku aranaku ni
wa ga kwopuru koto mo katarapi nagusamemu kimi ga tukapi wo mati ya kanetemu
ututu ni pa apu yosi mo nasi ime ni dani manaku miye kimi kwopwi ni sinu besi
ta so kare to twopaba kotapemu subye wo nami kimi ga tukapi wo kapyesituru kamo
omopanu ni itaraba imo ga uresimito wemamu maywobiki omopoyuru kamo
kaku bakari kwopwimu mono so to omopaneba imo ga tamoto wo makanu ywo mo ariki
kaku dani mo ware pa kwopwinamu tamadusano kimi ga tukapi wo mati ya kanetemu
imo ni kwopwi wa ga naku namita sikitapeno komakura topori swode sape nurenu
imo ni kwopwi wa ga naku namita sikitapeno makura toporite makeba samusi mo
tatite omopi wite mo so omopu kurenawi no akamo suswobiki inisi sugata wo
omopi ni si amarinisikaba subye wo nami idete so yukisi so no kadwo wo mi ni
kokoro ni pa tipye sikusikuni omopedomo tukapi wo yaramu subye no siranaku
ime nomwi ni miru sura kokoda kwopuru a pa ututu ni miteba masite ikani aramu
apimite pa omokakusaruru monokarani tugite mimaku no posiki kimi kamo
asatwo wo payaku na ake so adisapapu me ga poru kimi ga koyopi kimaseru
tamadareno wosu no taresu wo yukikateni i pa nasazu tomo kimi pa kaywopase
taratineno papa ni mawosaba kimi mo ware mo apu to pa nasi ni tosi so penu beki
utukusi to omopyerikye rasi na wasure to musubisi pimo no tokuraku omopeba
kinopu mite kyepu koso pyedate wagimokwo ga kokodaku tugite mimaku si posi mo
pito mo naki purinisi satwo ni aru pito wo meguku ya kimi ga kwopwi ni sinasuru
pitogoto no sigeki ma morite apu tomo ya sarani wa ga pe ni koto no sigekyemu
satwobito no kotoyoseduma wo arakakino yoso ni ya wa ga mimu nikuku aranaku ni
pitome moru kimi ga manima ni ware sapeni tutwoni okwitutu mo no suswo nurenu
nubatamano imo ga kurwokami koyopi mo ka wa ga naki toko ni nabikete nu ramu
panagupasi asikakigwosi ni tada pitome apimisi kwo yuwe titabi nagekitu
iro ni idete kwopwiba pito mite sirinu besi kokoro no uti no komoriduma pa mo
apimite pa kwopwinagusamu to pito pa ipedo mite noti ni so mo kwopwimasarikyeru
oborokani ware si omopaba kaku bakari kataki mikadwo wo makarideme ya mo
omopu ramu so no pito nare ya nubatamano ywo gotoni kimi ga ime ni si miyuru
omopu ramu so no pito nare ya nubatamano yworu piru to ipazu wa ga kwopwiwataru
kaku nomwi si kwopwiba sinu bemi taratineno papa ni mo tugetu yamazu kaywopase
masurawo pa tomo no sawaki ni nagusamoru kokoro mo arame ware zo kurusiki
itupari mo nitukite so suru itu ywori ka minu pito kwopwu to pito no sini sesi
kokoro sape matureru kimi ni nani wo ka mo ipazu ipisi to wa ga nusumapamu
omowasure dani mo esu ya to tanigirite utedomo korizu kwopwi to ipu yatukwo
medurasiki kimi wo mimu to koso pidarite no yumi toru kata no maywone kakiture
pitoma mori asikakigwosi ni wagimokwo wo apimisi karani koto so sada opoki
ima dani mo me na tomosime so apimizute kwopwimu tositukwi pisasikyemaku ni
asanegami ware pa kedurazi utukusiki kimi ga tamakura puretesi monowo
paya yukite itusika kimi wo apimimu to omopisi kokoro ima so nagwinuru
omokata no wasurete araba adukinaku wonokwozimono ya kwopwitutu woramu
koto ni ipeba mimi ni tayasusi sukunaku mo kokoro no uti ni wa ga omopanaku ni
adukinaku nani no tapakoto imasarani warapagoto suru oipito nisite
apimite pa ikupisasa ni mo aranaku ni tositukwi no goto omopoyuru kamo
masurawo to omopyeru ware wo kaku bakari kwopwi sesimuru pa asiku pa arikyeri
kaku situtu wa ga matu sirusi aranu kamo yo no pito mwina no tune naranaku ni
pitogoto wo sigemito kimi ni tamadusano tukapi mo yarazu wasuru to omopu na
opopara no purinisi satwo ni imo wo okite ware inekanetu ime ni miyekoso
yupu sareba kimi kimasamu to matisi ywo no nagori so ima mo inekateni suru
apiomopazu kimi pa aru rasi nubatamano ime ni mo miyezu ukepite nuredo
ipane pumi ywomiti pa yukazi to omopyeredo imo ni yorite pa sinobwikanetu mo
pitogoto no sigeki ma moru to apazu araba tupini ya kwora ga omo wasurenamu
kwopwisinamu noti pa nani semu wa ga inoti ikyeru pi ni koso mimaku pori sure
sikitape no makura ugwokite inerayezu monomopu koyopi paya mo akenu kamo
yukanu wa wo komu to ka yworu mo kadwo sasazu apare wagimokwo matitutu aru ramu
ime ni dani nani ka mo miyenu miyuredomo ware ka mo matwopu kwopwi no sigeki ni
nagusamoru kokoro pa nasi ni kaku nomwi si kwopwi ya wataramu tukwi ni pinikyeni
nagusamoru kokoro pa nasi ni okitunamisikite nomwi ya mo kwopwiwatarinamu
ikanisite wasuremu mono so wagimokwo ni kwopwi pa masaredo wasurayenaku ni
topoku aredo kimi ni so kwopuru tamapokono satwobito mwina ni ware kwopwime ya mo
sirusi naki kwopwi wo mo suru ka yupu sareba pito no te makite nu ramu kwo yuweni
momoyo si mo tiyo si mo ikite arame ya mo wa ga omopu imo wo okite nagekamu
ututu ni mo ime ni mo ware pa omopazariki puritaru kimi ni koko ni apamu to pa
kurwokami no sirakuru made to musubitesi kokoro pitotu wo ima tokame ya mo
kokoro wo si kimi ni maturu to omopyereba yosi ko no koro pa kwopwitutu wo aramu
omopiidete ne ni pa naku tomo itisirwoku pito no siru beku nagekasu na yume
tamapokono miti yukiburi ni omopanu ni imo wo apimite kwopuru koro kamo
pitome opomi tune kaku nomwi si samorapaba idure no toki ka wa ga kwopwizu aramu
sikitapeno koromode karete wa wo matu to aru ramu kwora pa omokage ni miyu
imo ga swode wakaresi pi ywori sirwotapeno koromo katasiki kwopwitutu so nuru
sirwotapeno swode pa mayupinu wagimokwo ga ipye no atari wo yamazu purisi ni
nubatamano wa ga kurwokami wo pikinurasi midarete sarani kwopwiwataru kamo
imasarani kimi ga tamakura maki neme ya wa ga pimo no wo no toketutu motona
sirwotapeno swode ni purete ywo wa ga sekwo ni wa ga kwopuraku pa yamu toki mo nasi
yupuke ni mo ura ni mo noreru koyopi dani kimasanu kimi wo itu to ka matamu
maywone kaki sita ipukasimi omopyeru ni inisipyepito wo apimituru kamo
maywone kaki tare wo ka mimu to omopitutu kenagaku kwopwisi imo ni apyeru kamo
maywone kaki sita ipukasimi omopyerisi imo ga sugata wo kyepu mituru kamo
sikitapeno makura wo makite imo to wa to nuru ywo pa nakute tosi so penikyeru
okuyamano makwi no itatwo wo oto payami imo ga atari no simo no upe ni nenu
asipikwino yamasakuratwo wo akeokite wa ga matu kimi wo tare ka todomuru
tukuywo yomi imo ni apamu to tadati kara ware pa kuredomo ywo so pukenikyeru
asakage ni wa ga mwi pa narinu karakoromo suswo no apazute pisasiku nareba
tokikinuno omopimidarete kwopuredomo na zo na ga yuwe so to twopu pito mo naki
surikoromo kyeri to ime ni mitu ututu ni pa tare si no pito no koto ka sigekyemu
sika no ama no sipoyakikoromo narenuredo kwopwi to ipu mono pa wasurekanetu mo
kurenawi no yasipo no koromo asanasana nare pa suredomo iya medurasi mo
kurenawi no kwosome no koromo iro pukaku siminisikaba ka wasurekaneturu
apanaku ni yupuke wo twopu to nusa ni oku ni wa ga koromode pa mata so tugu beki
purukoromo utituru pito pa akikaze no tatikuru toki ni monomopu mono so
panekadura ima suru imo ga urawakami wemi mi ikari mi tukesi pimo toku
inisipye no situpataobi wo musubitare tare to ipu pito mo kimi ni pa masazi
inisipye no saori no pimo wo musubitare tare si no pito mo kimi ni pa masazi
apazu tomo ware pa uramwizi ko no makura ware to omopite makite sanemase
yupyeru pimo tokamu pi topomi sikitapeno wa ga komakura pa koke musinikyeri
nubatamano kurwokami sikite nagaki ywo wo tamakura no upe ni imo matu ramu ka
maswokagami tadani si imo wo apimizupa wa ga kwopwiyamazi tosi pa penu tomo
maswokagami te ni torimotite asanasana mimu toki sape ya kwopwi no sigekyemu
satwo topomi kwopwiwabwinikyeri maswokagami omokage sarazu ime ni miyekoso
turugitati mwi ni pakisopuru masurawo ya kwopwi to ipu mono wo sinwobikanetemu
turugitati moropa no upe ni yukipurete sini ka mo sinamu kwopwitutu arazupa
utipanapwi pana wo so pwituru turugitati mwi ni swopu imo si omopikye rasi mo
adusayumi suwe no paranwo ni togari suru kimi ga yuduru no tayemu to omope ya
kadurakwi no sotubikwo mayumi arakwi ni mo tanome ya kimi ga wa ga na norikyemu
adusayumi piki mi yurupe mi kozupa kozu koba ko so wo na zo kozupa koba so wo
tokimori no utinasu tudumi yomimireba toki ni pa narinu apanaku mo ayasi
tomosibwi no kage ni kagaywopu utusemi no imo ga wemapi si omokage ni miyu
tamapokono miti yukitukare inamusiro sikite mo kimi wo mimu yosi moga mo
woparida no itada no pasi no koborenaba keta ywori yukamu na kwopwi so wagimo
miyakwi piku idumi no soma ni tatu tami no ikopu toki naku kwopwiwataru kamo
suminoye no tumori abiki no uke no wo no ukare ka yukamu kwopwitutu arazupa
yokogumo no swora yu pikikwosi topomi koso mekoto karu rame tayu to pyedate ya
ka ni kaku ni mono pa omopazi pidapito no utu suminapa no tada pitomiti ni
asipikwino yamata moru wodi ga oku kapwi no sitakwogare nomwi wa ga kwopwi woraku
swogiita moti pukyeru itame no apazaraba ikani semu to ka wa ga nesomekyemu
nanipapito asipwi taku ya no susite aredo ono ga tuma koso tune medurasiki
imo ga kami age takapanwo no panatigwoma arabwinikye rasi apanaku omopeba
uma no oto no todo to mo sureba matukage ni idete so mituru kedasi kimi ka to
kimi ni kwopwi inenu asake ni ta ga noreru uma no a no oto so ware ni kikasuru
kurenawi no suswo piku miti wo naka ni okite ware ka kaywopamu kimi ka kimasamu
kurenawi no suswo tuku kapa wo naka ni okite ware ka kaywopamu kimi ka kimasamu
kurenawi no suswo piku miti wo naka ni okite mati ni ka matamu kimi ka kimasamu
amatobuya karu no yasiro no ipapitukwi ikuyo made aramu komoriduma so mo
kamunabwi ni pimoroki tatete ipapedomo pito no kokoro pa mamori apenu mono
amakumo no yapyekumo gakureru naru kamwi no oto nomwi ni ya mo kikiwatarinamu
araswopeba kamwi mo nikumasu yosiweyasi yosopuru kimi ga nikuku aranaku ni
ywo narabete kimi wo kimase to tipayaburu kamwi no yasiro wo nomanu pi pa nasi
tamadipapu kamwi mo ware woba ututekoso siweya inoti no wosikyeku mo nasi
wagimokwo ni mata mo apamu to tipayaburu kamwi no yasiro wo nomanu pi pa nasi
tipayaburu kamwi no ikaki mo kwoyenu besi ima pa wa ga na no wosikyeku mo nasi
yupudukuywo akatokiyamwi no asakage ni wa ga mwi pa narinu na wo omopikane ni
tukwi si areba aku ramu waki mo sirazusite nete wa ga kosi wo pito mikyemu kamo
imo ga me no mimaku posikyeku yupuyamwi no konopa gomoreru tukwi matu gotosi
maswode moti toko utiparapi kimi matu to worisi apida ni tukwi katabukinu
putakami ni kakurapu tukwi no wosikyedomo imo ga tamoto wo karuru ko no koro
wa ga sekwo ga purisakemitutu nageku ramu kiywoki tukuywo ni kumo na tanabiki
maswokagami kiywoki tukuywo no yuturinaba omopi pa yamazu kwopwi koso masame
koyopi no ariake tukuywo aritutu mo kimi wo okite pa matu pito mo nasi
ko no yama no mine ni tikasi to wa ga mituru tukwi no swora naru kwopwi mo suru kamo
nubatamano ywo wataru tukwi no yuturinaba sarani ya imo ni wa ga kwopwi woramu
kutamiyama yupu wiru kumo no usureyukaba ware pa kwopwimu na kimi ga me wo pori
kimigakiru mikasanoyama ni wiru kumo no tateba tugaruru kwopwi mo suru kamo
pisakatano amatobu kumo ni aritesika kimi wo apimimu oturu pi nasi ni
sapo no uti yu arasi no kaze no pukinureba kapyerusa sirani nageku ywo so opoki
pasikiyasi pukanu kaze yuwe tamakusige akete sanenisi ware so kuyasiki
madwogwosi ni tukwi ositerite asipikwi no arasi puku ywo pa kimi wo si so omopu
kapatidori sumu sapa no upe ni tatu kwiri no itisirwokyemu na apiipisometeba
wa ga sekwo ga tukapi wo matu to kasa mo kizu idetutu so misi ame no puraku ni
karakoromo kimi ni utikise mimaku pori kwopwi so kurasisi ame no puru pi wo
wotikata no panipu no woya ni kwosame puri toko sape nurenu mwi ni swopye wagimo
kasa namito pito ni pa ipite amatutumi tomarisi kimi ga sugata si omopoyu
imo ga kadwo yukisugwikanetu pisakatano ame mo puranu ka so wo yosi ni semu
yupuke twopu wa ga swode ni oku siratuyu wo kimi ni misemu to toreba kenitutu
sakurawo no wopu no sitakusa tuyu si areba akasite iyukye papa pa siru tomo
matikanete uti ni pa irazi sirwotapeno wa ga koromode ni tuyu pa okinu tomo
asatuyuno keyasuki wa ga mwi oinu tomo mata wotikapyeri kimi wo si matamu
sirwotapeno wa ga koromode ni tuyu pa oki imo pa apasazu tayutapi nisite
ka ni kaku ni mono pa omopazi asatuyuno wa ga mwi pitotu pa kimi ga manima ni
yupukori no simo okinikyeri asatwode ni panapada pumite pito ni sirayu na
kaku bakari kwopwitutu arazupa asa ni ke ni imo ga pumu ramu tuti ni aramasi wo
asipikwino yamadorino wo no pitowo kwoye pitome misi kwo ni kwopu beki mono ka
wagimokwo ni apu yosi wo nami suruga n aru puzi no takane no moyetutu ka aramu
arakuma no sumu to pu yama no sipaseyama semete twopu tomo na ga na pa norazi
imo ga na mo wa ga na mo tataba wosimi koso puzinotakane no moyetutu watare
kimi ga na mo wa ga na mo tataba wosimi koso puzinotakane no moyetutu mo wore
yukite mite kureba kwoposiki asakagata yamagwosi ni okite inekatenu kamo
adapito no yana utiwatasu se wo payami kokoro pa omopedo tadani apanu kamo
tamakagiru ipakakiputi no komori ni pa pusite sinu tomo na ga na pa norazi
asukagapa asu mo wataramu isipasi no topoki kokoro pa omopoyenu kamo
asukagapa midu yukimasari iya pikyeni kwopwi no masaraba arikatu masizi
makomo karu oponwogapara no migomorini kwopwikosi imo ga pimo toku ware pa
asipikwino yamasita toyomi yuku midu no toki to mo naku mo kwopwiwataru kamo
pasikiyasi apanu kimi yuwe itadurani ko no kapa no se ni tamamo nurasitu
patusegapa payami payase wo musubiagete akazu ya imo to twopisi kimi pa mo
awoyama no ipakakinuma no migomorini kwopwi ya wataramu apu yosi wo nami
sinagadori winayama toyoni yuku midu no na nomwi yosayesi komoriduma pa mo
sinagadori winayama toyoni yuku midu no na nomwi yosayete kwopwitutu ya aramu
wagimokwo ni wa ga kwopuraku pa midu naraba sigarami kwosite yuku beku omopoyu
apiomopanu pito wo omopaku midu naraba sigarami kwosite yuku beku omopoyu
inukami no tokwonoyama ni aru isayagapa isa to wo kikose wa ga na norasu na
okuyama no konopa gakurete yuku midu no oto kikisi ywori tune wasurayezu
koto twokupa naka pa yodomase minasigapa tayu to ipu koto wo arikosu na yume
asukagapa yuku se wo payami payakyemu to matu ramu imo wo ko no pi kurasitu
mononopuno yaswoudikapa no payaki se ni tatienu kwopwi mo ware pa suru kamo
mononopuno yaswoudikapa no payaki se ni tatite mo kimi pa wasurekanetu mo
kamunabwi no utimwi no saki no ipaputi no komorite nomwi ya wa ga kwopwi woramu
takayama yu idekuru midu no ipa ni pure warete so omopu imo ni apanu ywo pa
asakoti ni wide kwosu nami no yoso me ni mo apanu monoyuwe taki mo todoroni
takayama no ipamoto tagiti yuku midu no oto ni pa tatezi kwopwite sinu tomo
komorinuno sita ni kwopureba akidarazu pito ni kataritu imu beki monowo
midutori no kamo no sumu ike no sitabwi nami ibuseki kimi wo kyepu mituru kamo
tamamo karu wide no sigarami usumi ka mo kwopwi no yodomyeru wa ga kokoro kamo
wagimokwo ga kasa no karite no wazaminwo ni ware pa irinu to imo ni tugekoso
amata aranu na wo si mo wosimi umoregwi no sita yu so kwopuru yuku pye sirazute
akikaze no tiye no uramwi no kotumi nasu kokoro pa yorinu noti pa siranedo
siramanagwo mitu no panipu no iro ni idete ipanaku nomwi so wa ga kwopuraku pa
kaze pukanu ura ni nami tatu naki na wo mo ware pa opyeru ka apu to pa nasi ni
kaze pukanu ura ni nami tatu naki na wo mo ware pa opyeru ka womina to omopite
sugasima no natumwi no ura ni yosuru nami apida mo okite wa ga omopanaku ni
apuminoumi oki tu simayama okumapete wa ga omopu imo ga koto no sigekyeku
ararepuri topotu opoura ni yosuru nami yosi mo yosu tomo nikukaranaku ni
kwi no umi no natakanoura ni yosuru nami oto takaki kamo apanu kwo yuweni
usimadwo no nami no siposawi sima toyomi yosayesi kimi pa apazu ka mo aramu
oki tu nami pyenami no kiyoru sada no ura no ko no sada sugwite noti kwopwimu kamo
siranami no kiyosuru sima no ariswo ni mo aramasi monowo kwopwitutu arazupa
sipo miteba minawa ni ukabu managwo ni mo ware pa ikyeru ka kwopwi pa sinazute
suminoye no kwisi no uramwi ni siku nami no sibasiba imo wo mimu yosi moga mo
kaze wo itami itaburu nami no apida naku wa ga omopu kimi pa apiomopu ramu ka
opotomonomitu no siranami apida naku wa ga kwopuraku wo pito no siranaku
opobune no tayutapu umi ni ikari orosi ikani seba ka mo wa ga kwopwiyamamu
misagwo wiru oki tu ariswo ni yosuru nami yuku pye mo sirazu wa ga kwopuraku pa
opobune no tomo ni mo pe ni mo yosuru nami yosu tomo ware pa kimi ga manima ni
opoumi ni tatu ramu nami pa apida arame kimi ni kwopuraku yamu toki mo nasi
sika no ama no keburi yakitatete yaku sipo no karaki kwopwi wo mo ware pa suru kamo
nakanakani kimi ni kwopwizupa pira no ura no ama naramasi wo tamamo karitutu
nakanakani kimi ni kwopwizupa napa no ura no ama ni aramasi wo tamamo karukaru
suzuki toru ama no tomosibwi yoso ni dani minu pito yuweni kwopuru ko no koro
minatwoiri no asiwakewobune sapari opomi wa ga omopu kimi ni apanu koro kamo
nipa kiywomi oki pye kogiduru amabune no kadi toru ma naki kwopwi mo suru kamo
adikamano sipotu wo sasite kogu pune no na pa noritesi wo apazarame ya mo
opobune ni asini karitumi simimini mo imo pa kokoro ni norinikyeru kamo
payumadi ni pikipune watasi tadanorini imo pa kokoro ni norinikyeru kamo
wagimokwo ni apanaku pisasi umasimono abetatibana no koke musu madeni
adi no sumu susa no iriye no ariswomatu a wo matu kwora pa tada pitori nomwi
wagimokwo wo kiki tuganwopye no sinapinebu a pa sinobiezu manaku si omopeba
nami no ma yu miyuru kwosima no pamapisagwi pisasiku narinu kimi ni apazusite
asakasipa uruyakapapye no sinwonome no sinwopite nureba ime ni miyekyeri
asadipara kari sime sasite munakoto mo yosayesi kimi ga koto wo si matamu
tukwikusano karinaru inoti ni aru pito wo ikani sirite ka noti mo apamu to pu
opokimi no mikasa ni nupyeru arimasuge aritutu miredo kotonaki wagimo
suganoneno nemokoro imo ni kwopuru ni si masurawogokoro omopoyenu kamo
wa ga yadwo no potade purukara tumi oposi mwi ni naru madeni kimi wo si matamu
asipikwino yamasapawegu wo tumi ni yukamu pi dani mo apase papa pa semu tomo
okuyama no ipamotosuge no ne pukaku mo omopoyuru kamo wa ga omopiduma pa
asikaki no naka no nikwogusa nikwoyokani ware to wemasite pito ni sirayu na
kurenawino asapa no nwora ni karu kaya no tuka no apida mo wa wo wasurasu na
imo ga tame inoti nokoseri karikomono omopimidarete sinu beki monowo
wagimokwo ni kwopwitutu arazupa karikomono omopimidarete sinu beki monowo
misimaye no iriye no komo wo karini koso ware woba kimi pa omopitarikyere
asipikino yamatatibana no iro ni idete wa ga kwopwinamu wo pitome katamisu na
asitadu no sawaku iriye no sirasuge no sirasemu tame to kotitakaru kamo
wa ga sekwo ni wa ga kwopuraku pa natukusa no karisokuredomo opwisiku gotosi
miti no pye no itusibapara no itu mo itu mo pito no yurusamu koto wo si matamu
wagimokwo ga swode wo tanomite manwonoura no kwosuge no kasa wo kizute kinikyeri
manwo no ike no kwosuge wo kasa ni nupazusite pito no topona wo tatu beki mono ka
sasutakeno yogomorite are wa ga sekwo ga wagari si kozupa ware kwopwime ya mo
kamunabwi no asazinwopara no utukusimi wa ga omopu kimi ga kowe no sirukyeku
yama takami tanipye ni papyeru tamakadura tayuru toki naku mimu yosi moga mo
miti no pye no kusa wo puyunwo ni pumikarasi ware tatimatu to imo ni tugekoso
tatamikomo pyedateamu kazu kaywopasaba miti no sibakusa opwizu aramasi wo
minasoko ni opuru tamamo no opwiidezu yosi ko no koro pa kakute kaywopamu
unapara no oki tu napanori utinabiki kokoro mo sinwoni omopoyuru kamo
murasakino natakanoura no nabikimo no kokoro pa imo ni yorinisi monowo
wata no soko oki wo pukamete opuru mo no motomo ima koso kwopwi pa subye naki
sanu gani pa tare to mo nemedo okitumo no nabikisi kimi ga koto matu ware wo
wagimokwo ga nani to mo ware wo omopaneba pupumyeru pana no po ni sakinu besi
komori ni pa kwopwite sinu tomo misonopu no karaawi no pana no iro ni ideme ya mo
saku pana pa suguru toki aredo wa ga kwopuru kokoro no uti pa yamu toki mo nasi
yamabuki no nipopyeru imo ga panezuiro no akamo no sugata ime ni miyetutu
ametuti no yoriapi no kipami tamanowono tayezi to omopu imo ga atari mitu
iki no wo ni omopeba kurusi tamanowono tayete midarena siraba siru tomo
tamanowono tayetaru kwopwi no midarenaba sinamaku nomwi so mata mo apazusite
tama no wo no kukuriyosetutu suwe tupini yuki pa wakarezu onazi wo ni aramu
kataito moti nukitaru tama no wo wo ywowami midare ya sinamu pito no siru beku
tamanowono utusigokoro ya tositukwi no yukikaparu made imo ni apazaramu
tamanowono apida mo okazu mimaku pori wa ga omopu imo pa ipye topokusite
komoridu no sapatatumi ni aru ipane yu mo toposite so omopu kimi ni apamaku pa
kwinokuni no akura no pama no wasuregapi ware pa wasurezi tosi pa penu tomo
midu kukuru tama ni mazireru iswokapi no katakwopwi nomwi ni tosi pa penitutu
suminoye no pama ni yoru to ipu utusegapi mwi naki koto moti ware kwopwime ya mo
ise no ama no asana yupuna ni kaduku to ipu apabi no kapi no katamopi nisite
pitogoto wo sigemito kimi wo uduranaku pito no purupye ni katarapite yaritu
akatoki to kakye pa naku nari yosiweyasi pitori nuru ywo pa akeba akenu tomo
opoumi no ariswo no sudori asanasana mimaku posiki wo miyenu kimi kamo
omopedomo omopi mo kanetu asipikwino yamadori no wo no nagaki ko no ywo wo
asipikwino yamadori no wo no sidariwo no naganagasi ywo wo pitori ka mo nemu
satwonaka ni naku naru kakye no ywobitatete itakupa nakanu komoriduma pa mo
satwo toyome naku naru kakye no ywobitatete itakupa nakanu komoriduma pa mo
takayama ni takabye sawatari takatakani wa ga matu kimi wo matiidemu kamo
isenoumi yu nakikuru tadu no otodoro mo kimi ga kikosaba ware kwopwime ya mo
wagimokwo ni kwopure ni ka aramu oki ni sumu kamo no ukine no yasukyeku mo nasi
akenu beku tidori sibanaku sirwotapeno kimi ga tamakura imada akanaku ni
maywone kaki panapwi pimo toke materi ya mo itu ka mo mimu to kwopwikosi ware wo
kyepu nareba panapwi panapwisi maywo kayumi omopisi koto pa kimi ni si arikyeri
oto nomwi wo kikite ya kwopwimu maswokagami tadameni apite kwopwimaku mo itaku
ko no koto wo kikamu to na rasi maswokagami tereru tukuywo mo yamwi nomwi ni mitu
wagimokwo ni kwopwite subye nami sirwotapeno swode kapyesisi pa ime ni miyeki ya
wa ga sekwo ga swode kapyesu ywo no ime na rasi makoto mo kimi ni apitaru gotosi
wa ga kwopwi pa nagusamekanetu make nagaku ime ni miyezute tosi no penureba
make nagaku ime ni mo miyezu tayenu tomo wa ga katakwopwi pa yamu toki mo arazi
uraburete mono na omoposi amakumono tayutapu kokoro wa ga omopanaku ni
uraburete mono pa omopazi minasegapa arite mo midu pa yuku to ipu monowo
kakitupata sakinu no suge wo kasa ni nupi kimu pi wo matu ni tosi so penikyeru
ositeru nanipasugakasa okipurusi noti pa ta ga kimu kasa naranaku ni
kaku dani mo imo wo matinamu saywo pukete idekosi tukwi no katabuku madeni
konoma ywori uturopu tukwi no kage wo wosimi tatimotoporu ni saywo pukenikyeri
takupireno sirapamanami no yori mo apezu araburu imo ni kwopwitutu so woru
takupireno sirapamanami no yori mo apezu araburu imo ni kwopuru koro kamo
kapyeramani kimi koso ware ni takupireno sirapamanami no yoru toki mo naki
omopu pito komu to siriseba yapyemugura opopyeru nipa ni tama sikamasi wo
tama sikyeru ipye mo nani semu yapye mugura opopyeru kwoya mo imo to si woraba
kaku situtu arinagusamete tamanowono tayete wakareba subye nakaru besi
kurenawi no pana ni si araba koromode ni sometuke motite yuku beku omopoyu
kurenawi no kwosome no kinu wo sita ni kiba pito no miraku ni nipopiidemu kamo
koromo si mo opoku aranamu torikapete kireba ya kimi ga omo wasuretaru
adusayumi yuduka makikape naka misasi sarani piku tomo kimi ga manima ni
misagwo wiru su ni wiru pune no yupusipo wo matu ramu ywori pa ware koso masare
yamagapa ni upe wo si pusete moriapezu tosi no yatose wo wa ga nusumapisi
asigamo no sudaku ikemidu apuru tomo makemizo no pye ni ware kwoyeme ya mo
yamato no murwopu no kemomo moto sigeku ipitesi monowo narazupa yamazi
makuzu papu wonwo no asadi wo kokoro yu mo pito pikame ya mo wa ga nakyenaku ni
misimasuge imada nape nare toki mataba kizu ya narinamu misimasugakasa
miyosinwo no miguma ga suge wo amanaku ni kari nomwi karite midaritemu to ya
kapakami ni arapu wakana no nagarekite imo ga atari no se ni koso yorame
kaku site ya napo ya mamoramu opoarakwi no ukita no mori no sime ni aranaku ni
ikubaku mo puranu ame yuwe wa ga sekwo ga mina no kokodaku taki mo todoroni
